finding_results.notes: Added rehearsal beats that give James a pressure-shaped anti-freeze ritual and daughter-facing exposure stake, and Helen a choice to keep her damaged hand on the pry bar because she is still the smallest body for the gap. The assault and retreat now reactivate those exact specifics instead of spending them as generic attrition.

Kept the post-retreat accounting where the failure state lands, then cut the second inventory of already-known losses. The final movement now turns on the fresh image of Noor's blood reaching the keyboard and the immediate pressure of colder air and renewed retching before she refuses to type.
The cafeteria-worker observation is now rendered in present tense throughout.
Removed the opening internalization simile that repeated 'swallow' and kept only Marcus's literal swallow beat.

James now breaks across two beats: a glimpse of the injury during the breach and the actual death through retreat witness-reaction. Viktor remains the direct blunt-force kill. Helen's death lands through sound-only aftermath. The three deaths no longer share the same blow-failure-stillness sequence.
Cut the repeated collar/cuff degradation language and replaced it with one new shirt detail, a fresh rust mark.
The opening now starts on the cold metal shock itself instead of re-explaining the building's gradual cooling.
Compressed the relay-world reminder to a single family-updates reference and removed the repeated topic list.
Replaced corridor repetition with hall/service-hall framing and local directional cues. Verified chapter count: 0 instances of 'corridor'.
